title: 'unsafe-inline' is not ignored even though 'strict-dynamic' is specified in dafault-src.
description_snippet:
**Steps to reproduce the problem:**   
1. Access to the following page  
<!DOCTYPE html>  
<html lang="en">  
<head>  
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'unsafe-inline' 'strict-dynamic'">  
</head>  
<body>  
<script>alert(1)</script>  
</body>  
</html>
